author: Apprises
text:
Skip on_external_delete sweep when ball already closed

An already-closed mirror ball whose GH issue was deleted from the repo was being flipped to status=deferred by the on_external_delete sweep, resurrecting finished work into bl list. External delete on local work that's already shipped is not a signal to re-open the question — guard deleted_from so a closed task emits no SyncUpdate.
